race.comment: OCEAN REEF (4) flew home on debut to miss by 0.9L at Belmont when handling the soggy going. The form out of that has already stood up and Carbery sticks with him. He looks suited out in distance now and with the race experience he's gained, he can get the job done. LETS TAKE A CHANCE (6) landed midfield on debut and was solid to the line, missing by 3.2L at Bunbury. He showed good ability there, with more distance and a better barrier both ticks for his chances he appears the main danger. MYSTIC CHAOS (11) was good here last start when sitting handy, ending up 1.8L off the winner at this track and trip. This shapes similarly and another forward showing is on the cards. SPANISH ARMADA (2) was solid on resumption and can feature despite the wide barrier. FIELD MISTRESS (12) is third-up now and can't be left out of calculations.
